title: Manufacturing Engineer - Voltas Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Voltas Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Voltas Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Voltas Digital Technologies:
Voltas Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
